## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Prophecy and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, positioning updates, and distribution plans.](https://fathom.video/share/LD9PRyfmtuT61nsiZBQ7ux9uu2ssBcgz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Prophecy has evolved positioning to "AI native analytics and automation platform", reflecting broader industry shifts](https://fathom.video/share/LD9PRyfmtuT61nsiZBQ7ux9uu2ssBcgz?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Focus on balancing self-service and governance in messaging, addressing data democratization challenges](https://fathom.video/share/LD9PRyfmtuT61nsiZBQ7ux9uu2ssBcgz?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [Plans to improve content distribution through targeted campaigns, social media, and potentially newsletters](https://fathom.video/share/LD9PRyfmtuT61nsiZBQ7ux9uu2ssBcgz?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [Aim to select 1-2 featured articles weekly for broader promotion and sales enablement](https://fathom.video/share/LD9PRyfmtuT61nsiZBQ7ux9uu2ssBcgz?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)

## Topics

### Positioning and Messaging Evolution

  - [Shifted from "data transformation co-pilot" to "data integration platform" to current "AI native analytics and automation platform"](https://fathom.video/share/LD9PRyfmtuT61nsiZBQ7ux9uu2ssBcgz?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [Core product stable, but outer messaging layer adapting rapidly to market changes](https://fathom.video/share/LD9PRyfmtuT61nsiZBQ7ux9uu2ssBcgz?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Analytics now refers to end-to-end data process, not just analysis/BI](https://fathom.video/share/LD9PRyfmtuT61nsiZBQ7ux9uu2ssBcgz?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [Emphasizing balance between self-service and governance](https://fathom.video/share/LD9PRyfmtuT61nsiZBQ7ux9uu2ssBcgz?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)

### Customer Landscape Changes

  - [Trend towards hub-and-spoke model in organizations for data management](https://fathom.video/share/LD9PRyfmtuT61nsiZBQ7ux9uu2ssBcgz?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
  - [Buyers shifting from siloed technical roles to higher-level analytics leads](https://fathom.video/share/LD9PRyfmtuT61nsiZBQ7ux9uu2ssBcgz?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Increased acceptance of data complexity and need for flexible solutions](https://fathom.video/share/LD9PRyfmtuT61nsiZBQ7ux9uu2ssBcgz?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [Challenge: enabling data democratization while maintaining governance](https://fathom.video/share/LD9PRyfmtuT61nsiZBQ7ux9uu2ssBcgz?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)

### Content Strategy and Distribution

  - [Currently relying heavily on SEO for blog content](https://fathom.video/share/LD9PRyfmtuT61nsiZBQ7ux9uu2ssBcgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
  - [Plans to improve internal sharing and social media distribution](https://fathom.video/share/LD9PRyfmtuT61nsiZBQ7ux9uu2ssBcgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
  - [Considering newsletter and/or blog roundup email](https://fathom.video/share/LD9PRyfmtuT61nsiZBQ7ux9uu2ssBcgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1265.0)
  - [Aim to select 1-2 featured articles weekly for broader promotion](https://fathom.video/share/LD9PRyfmtuT61nsiZBQ7ux9uu2ssBcgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
  - [Developing process to create additional collateral (LinkedIn posts, sales enablement) for featured content](https://fathom.video/share/LD9PRyfmtuT61nsiZBQ7ux9uu2ssBcgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1454.0)

### Performance and Next Steps

  - [Traffic showing steady upward trend](https://fathom.video/share/LD9PRyfmtuT61nsiZBQ7ux9uu2ssBcgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
  - [Working on 6 pre-approved articles, 3 delivered for review last week](https://fathom.video/share/LD9PRyfmtuT61nsiZBQ7ux9uu2ssBcgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
  - [2 articles staged for publishing this week](https://fathom.video/share/LD9PRyfmtuT61nsiZBQ7ux9uu2ssBcgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [Plan to start new featured content process next week, with first campaign piece in July](https://fathom.video/share/LD9PRyfmtuT61nsiZBQ7ux9uu2ssBcgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)
  - [Will use "Main Index Select" field in content planning doc to flag featured articles](https://fathom.video/share/LD9PRyfmtuT61nsiZBQ7ux9uu2ssBcgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to update content artifacts based on Prophecy's feedback](https://fathom.video/share/LD9PRyfmtuT61nsiZBQ7ux9uu2ssBcgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1877.0)
  - [Prophecy to finalize process for selecting and promoting featured weekly content](https://fathom.video/share/LD9PRyfmtuT61nsiZBQ7ux9uu2ssBcgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)
  - [Discuss newsletter strategy in more detail in next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/LD9PRyfmtuT61nsiZBQ7ux9uu2ssBcgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
  - [Schedule longer meeting next week to dive deeper into working sessions](https://fathom.video/share/LD9PRyfmtuT61nsiZBQ7ux9uu2ssBcgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Prophecy to provide more guidance on desired additional collateral for featured content (LinkedIn posts, sales enablement materials)](https://fathom.video/share/LD9PRyfmtuT61nsiZBQ7ux9uu2ssBcgz?tab=summary&timestamp=1703.0)
